bead.title: agent/lock: instrument bead.Store WithLock wait time + tracker-lock acquisition metrics
bead.description:
PROBLEM
  When parallel-worker drain mode is enabled (multiple ddx work --once
  shells running concurrently), bead.Store.WithLock and the agent-layer
  tracker locks become a contention surface. Today there is no
  observability into lock wait time, lock-hold duration, or contention
  rate — failures manifest as 30s MaxElapsed exhaustion and
  resource_exhausted outcomes, with no telemetry to debug.

  The 2026-05-09 plan-review opus self-review identified this as a
  prerequisite for safely scaling up to N=2..4 parallel workers: without
  per-lock metrics, we cannot tell whether a 10s WithLock wait
  (lock.go:18-27 default) is approaching its budget under load, or
  whether 30s tracker-lock MaxElapsed (tracker_lock.go:51) is being
  exhausted by a long-tail of concurrent acquisitions vs occasional
  hot-path blocking.

ROOT CAUSE
  - cli/internal/bead/lock.go:18-27 WithLock has no instrumentation; it
    spins at 50ms intervals and waits up to 10s by default. Wait time is
    not measured or emitted.
  - cli/internal/bead/tracker_lock.go:105-183 withTrackerLock /
    withMainGitLock acquire/release path has no instrumentation.
  - There is no operator-facing dashboard, log, or metric for lock
    contention.

PROPOSED FIX
  Add lightweight metrics around three lock surfaces:

  1. bead.Store.WithLock (cli/internal/bead/lock.go:18-27):
     - Record lock-wait duration (time from WithLock entry to lock
       acquisition).
     - Record lock-hold duration (time the callback held the lock).
     - Emit via the existing agentmetrics package (or a new bead-metrics
       channel) keyed by call site.

  2. withTrackerLock / withMainGitLock (cli/internal/bead/tracker_lock.go:105-183):
     - Same wait/hold instrumentation.
     - Additional: record retry-attempt count when DefaultLockRetryPolicy
       is consumed (so we see "needed 3 retries" vs "got it on first
       attempt").

  3. Exit code / stop reason aggregation:
     - When a worker times out at MaxElapsed, capture the lock identity
       and the holder's claimant-PID at point of exhaustion. Today the
       error message is generic.

  Surface format:
     - Existing agentmetrics output (likely .ddx/agent-metrics or
       similar; check cli/internal/agentmetrics for existing API).
     - Or stdout JSON line per lock acquire/release if no agentmetrics
       sink exists.

  Add tests:
     - TestWithLock_RecordsWaitDuration: assert metric is captured for a
       contended lock.
     - TestTrackerLock_RecordsRetryCount: assert retry count metric is
       captured under simulated contention.

NON-SCOPE
  - Fixing lock contention itself (sister bead ddx-1f774edf removes the
    big contributor; this bead is observability for what's left).
  - Building a lock-contention dashboard (separate concern; just emit
    the data).
  - Reducing the 10s/30s budgets (those are correct; the metric tells
    us if they're tight).

INTERSECTIONS
  - Sister bead ddx-1f774edf (network-free Land()) drops the big
    contention cause; this bead provides visibility into what remains.
  - Sister bead ddx-c019e48a (chaos for stale-lock recovery) covers
    correctness; this bead covers visibility.
  - Sister bead (just-filed) "agent/chaos: cover concurrent-drain
    landing under shared-main contention" needs this metrics surface to
    write meaningful assertions.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/bead/lock.go WithLock records wait-duration and hold-duration via agentmetrics or equivalent observable channel.
2. cli/internal/bead/tracker_lock.go withTrackerLock / withMainGitLock records wait, hold, and retry-count metrics.
3. When tracker_lock.go exhausts DefaultLockRetryPolicy.MaxElapsed, the resulting error message includes the lock identity and the holder's claimant-PID (not just a generic timeout).
4. TestWithLock_RecordsWaitDuration in cli/internal/bead/lock_test.go (or new test file) asserts the metric is captured for a contended lock.
5. TestTrackerLock_RecordsRetryCount in cli/internal/bead/tracker_lock_test.go (or new test file) asserts retry count metric is captured under simulated contention.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/bead/... ./internal/agent/... green.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
